query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vocus_mobile_services) as mobile_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vocus_nbn_services) as nbn_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vocus_buckets) as bucket_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vocus_sync_log) as sync_log_count;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vocus_mobile_services) as mobile_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vocus_nbn_services) as nbn_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vocus_buckets) as bucket_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vocus_sync_log) as sync_log_count;
